a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
L (x1 + a2 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ (pr2 (@op A c2a (pr2 xa3))) l1).
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))

  (x3 + a2 + (c2 + (a1 + c1)))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)

a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a2 + c2 + (a1 + c1))

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ (pr2 (@op A (pr2 xa1) c1a)) l2).
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3) = x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1)
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
e: x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3) =
x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1)
L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3) = x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + a1 + (c1 + (c2 + a3)) = x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + a1 + (c1 + (c2 + a3)) =
x2 + a3 + (c2 + (a1 + c1))

rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)

a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + (a1 + (c1 + (c2 + a3))) =
x2 + a3 + (c2 + (a1 + c1))

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)

l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + (a1 + (c1 + (c2 + a3))) =
x2 + (a3 + (c2 + (a1 + c1)))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)

l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)

a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + (a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3)) =
x2 + (a3 + (c2 + (a1 + c1)))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + (a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3)) =
x2 + (a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + (c2 + a3 + (a1 + c1)) =
x2 + (a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
x2 + (c2 + a3 + (a1 + c1)) =
x2 + (c2 + a3 + (a1 + c1))
 apply idpath.
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
e: x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3) =
x2 + a3 + c2 + (a1 + c1)
L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
ll1: L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
ll2: L (x2 + a1 + c1 + (c2 + a3))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
L (x1 + a3 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
  (x3 + a1 + (a2 + (c1 + c2)))
 apply (isl _ _ _ ll1 ll2).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
istrans (abmonoidfracrel X A is)

istrans (abmonoidfracrel X A is)

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istrans L
istrans L
 apply isl.
Defined.

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: issymm L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: issymm L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ∃ c0 : A,
  L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
    (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: issymm L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0))

isl: issymm L

    (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: issymm L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: issymm L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: issymm L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c1a)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c1a)
 apply (isl _ _ l1).
Qed.

→ make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  (pr1 xa + pr12 xa + pr1 c0)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 apply (isl _ (pr2 t2)).

is: ispartbinophrel A L

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X : isassoc op: isassoc op
isasymm (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
isasymm (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: iscomm op
isasymm (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
isasymm (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
∏ x1 x2 : setwithbinopdirprod X A,
abmonoidfracrelint X A L x1 x2
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L x2 x1 → ∅

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1 → ∅
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ (∃ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) → ∅
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) → ∅

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∑ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0))
  → make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c1 + c2) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c1 + c2) (x2 + a1 + c1 + c2)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + c1)
 apply l1.
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
L (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)) (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2))
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)

c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
ll2: L (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)) (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2))
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X

isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')

a2:= pr12 xa2: X

  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c2 + c1)) (x2 + a1 + (c2 + c1))
L (x2 + a1 + (c2 + c1)) (x1 + a2 + (c2 + c1))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + (c2 + c1))
L (x2 + a1 + (c2 + c1)) (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + c2 + c1)
L (x2 + a1 + c2 + c1) (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + c2 + c1)
L (x2 + a1 + c2) (x1 + a2 + c2)

    apply l2.
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
ll2: L (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)) (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2))
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

  apply (isl _ _ ll1 ll2).
Qed.

A: subabmonoid X

abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscoasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nl0: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nl:= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nl0 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscoasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nl0: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nl:= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nl0 0: ¬ L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
    (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscoasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nl0: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nl:= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nl0 0: ¬ L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
    (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
l:= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0) nl: L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscoasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nl0: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nl:= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nl0 0: ¬ L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
    (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
l:= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0) nl: L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
∑ c0 : A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscoasymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nl0: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nl:= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nl0 0: ¬ L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
    (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
l:= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0) nl: L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + 0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + 0)
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0)

  apply l.
Qed.

isl: istotal L

abmonoidfracrelint X A L x1 x2
∨ abmonoidfracrelint X A L x2 x1
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
∨ (∃ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
int:= isl (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1): L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
∨ L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
∨ (∃ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
int:= isl (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1): L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
∨ L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
∨ L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
→ (∃ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
  ∨ (∃ c0 : A,
     L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
∨ L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
→ (∃ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
  ∨ (∃ c0 : A,
     L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
   ⨿ L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2))
→ ishinh_UU
    (ishinh_UU
       (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
        L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
          (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
     ⨿ ishinh_UU
         (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
          L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
            (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
⨿ L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
l: L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2) (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1)
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0))
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1) (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2)
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0))

L (pr1 x1 + pr12 x2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x2 + pr12 x1 + pr1 c0)

isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X : isassoc op: isassoc op

X: abmonoid

L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
iscotrans (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X : iscomm op: iscomm op
iscotrans (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
iscotrans (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
iscotrans (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
∏ x1 x2 x3 : setwithbinopdirprod X A,
abmonoidfracrelint X A L x1 x3
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L x1 x2
  ∨ abmonoidfracrelint X A L x2 x3

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa3
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
  ∨ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa3
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ (∃ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
  ∨ (∃ c0 : A,
     L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (ishinh_UU
       (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
        L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
          (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
     ⨿ ishinh_UU
         (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
          L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
            (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∑ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ∥ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
    ⨿ ishinh_UU
        (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
         L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
           (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) ∥
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
         (pr1 xa3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0))
∥
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

a2:= pr12 xa2: X

     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)

    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X

z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

A: subabmonoid X

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')

z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
L (x1 + a3 + (c0 + a2)) (x3 + a1 + (c0 + a2))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)

a2:= pr12 xa2: X

z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
L (x1 + a3 + c0 + a2) (x3 + a1 + (c0 + a2))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
L (x1 + a3 + c0 + a2) (x3 + a1 + c0 + a2)

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ (pr2 (pr2 xa2)) l0).
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
int':= isl z1 z2 z3 int: L z1 z2 ∨ L z2 z3
∥ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
  ⨿ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
int':= isl z1 z2 z3 int: L z1 z2 ∨ L z2 z3
L z1 z2 ∨ L z2 z3
→ ∥ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
    ⨿ ishinh_UU
        (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
         L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
L z1 z2 ∨ L z2 z3
→ ∥ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
       L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
    ⨿ ishinh_UU
        (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
         L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)) ∥

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
ishinh_UU (L z1 z2 ⨿ L z2 z3)
→ ishinh_UU
    (ishinh_UU
       (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
        L (x1 + a2 + pr1 c0) (x2 + a1 + pr1 c0))
     ⨿ ishinh_UU
         (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
          L (x2 + a3 + pr1 c0) (x3 + a2 + pr1 c0)))

L z1 z2 ⨿ L z2 z3
→ ishinh_UU

assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
l23: L z2 z3
L (x2 + a3 + pr1 (pr2 xa1 + c0a))
  (x3 + a2 + pr1 (pr2 xa1 + c0a))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
l23: L z2 z3
L (x2 + a3 + (a1 + c0)) (x3 + a2 + (a1 + c0))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)

l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X

z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
l23: L z2 z3
L (x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0)) (x3 + a2 + (a1 + c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: iscotrans L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
xa1, xa2, xa3: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
c0a:= pr1 t2: pr1 A
l0:= pr2 t2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa3 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa3 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2)
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x3:= pr1 xa3: X
a3:= pr12 xa3: X
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
z1:= x1 + a3 + (a2 + c0): X
z2:= x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0): X
z3:= x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0): X
int: L z1 z3
l23: L z2 z3
L (x2 + a1 + (a3 + c0)) (x3 + a1 + (a2 + c0))

    apply l23.
Qed.

Qed.

Definition StrongOrder_abmonoidfrac {X : abmonoid} (Y : @submonoid X) (gt : StrongOrder X)
           (Hgt : ispartbinophrel Y gt) : StrongOrder (abmonoidfrac X Y) :=
  abmonoidfracrel X Y Hgt,, isStrongOrder_abmonoidfrac Y gt Hgt (pr2 gt).

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X

is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X A,
make_hProp
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     → setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x =
       setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x'))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
make_hProp
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
         (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
     → setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1 =
       setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
r: ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
r': ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1 =
setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
r: ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
r': ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
r: ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
r': ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
→ ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
  → eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
    (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
→ ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
      (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
  → eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
→ ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
  → eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
(¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2 → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
nr12':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nr12 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
nr12':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nr12 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
nr21':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) nr21 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
nr12':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nr12 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
nr21':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) nr21 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
int':= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0) nr12' nr21': pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0
eqrelabmonoidfrac X A xa1 xa2

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
nr12':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nr12 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
nr21':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) nr21 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
int':= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0) nr12' nr21': pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : pr1 A,
   pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 a0 =
   pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 a0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
nr12':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nr12 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
nr21':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) nr21 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
int':= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0) nr12' nr21': pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0
∑ a0 : pr1 A,
pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 a0
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → ¬ abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
nr12: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
nr21: ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa2 xa1
nr12':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) nr12 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
nr21':= neghexisttoforallneg
  (λ c0 : A,
   L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) nr21 0: (¬ (λ c0 : A,
    L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
      (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 0)%logic
int':= isl (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0) nr12' nr21': pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0
pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0
 apply int'.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X A,
make_hProp
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     → setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x =
       setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x'))

comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
