isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
make_hProp
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
       (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
     → setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1 =
       setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2)
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa1)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) xa2))

isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
∑ a0 : pr1 A,
pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 a0
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
∑ a0 : pr1 A,
pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 a0 =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 a0

is: ispartbinophrel A L

assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')

  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2

  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)

c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A

 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 (c1a + c2a) =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 (c1a + c2a)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
x1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 (c1a + c2a) =
pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 (c1a + c2a)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 (c1a + c2a) =
pr1 xa2 + a1 + pr1 (c1a + c2a)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
x1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 (c1a + c2a) =
x2 + a1 + pr1 (c1a + c2a)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x1 + a2 + pr1 (c1a + c2a) = x2 + a1 + pr1 (c1a + c2a)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2) = x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)

A: subabmonoid X

is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L

isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)

  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,

 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)

l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)

c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2) = x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')

isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X

a1:= pr12 xa1: X

a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c1 + c2) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))

A: subabmonoid X

isl: isantisymm L

comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x

t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,

   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)

 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c1 + c2) (x2 + a1 + c1 + c2)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + c1)

    apply l1.

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x

isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2) = x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)

isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2

  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,

   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0))

a1:= pr12 xa1: X

a2:= pr12 xa2: X

ll2: L (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)) (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2))
x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2) = x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)

  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)

   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

a1:= pr12 xa1: X

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + c2 + c1)
L (x2 + a1 + c2 + c1) (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + c2 + c1) (x2 + a1 + c2 + c1)
L (x2 + a1 + c2) (x1 + a2 + c2)

    apply l2.
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isl: isantisymm L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is x1 x2
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l1: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
t2l2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
c1a:= pr1 t2l1: pr1 A
l1:= pr2 t2l1: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l1)
c2a:= pr1 t2l2: pr1 A
l2:= pr2 t2l2: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l2)
c1:= pr1 c1a: pr1 X
c2:= pr1 c2a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ll1: L (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2)) (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2))
ll2: L (x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)) (x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2))
x1 + a2 + (c1 + c2) = x2 + a1 + (c1 + c2)

  apply (isl _ _ ll1 ll2).
Qed.


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
assoc:= assocax X : isassoc op: isassoc op
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: iscomm op
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x

ispartbinophrel
  (λ xa : setwithbinopdirprod X A, A (pr1 xa))
  (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa + pr12 yb + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 yb + pr12 xa + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU

     L
       (pr1 zc + pr1 xa +
        (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 zc) +
         pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 yb)) + 
        pr1 c0)
       (pr1 zc + pr1 yb +
        (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 zc) +
         pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa)) + 
        pr1 c0))

rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

Qed.



X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
z, z': abmonoidfrac X A
l: abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
abmonoidfracrel X A is
  (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
  (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z')


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
z, z': abmonoidfrac X A
l: abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
abmonoidfracrel X A is
  (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
  (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z')

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
→ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
    (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z')

∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X A,
make_hProp
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' +
        setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' +
        setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x'))
  (int (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x'))

  (abmonoidfracrel X A is

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)

isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ∃ c0 : A,
  L
    (pr1 ((pr1 aa,, aa') + xa1) +
     pr12 ((pr1 aa,, aa') + xa2) + 
     pr1 c0)
    (pr1 ((pr1 aa,, aa') + xa2) +
     pr12 ((pr1 aa,, aa') + xa1) + 
     pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L
       (pr1 aa + pr1 xa1 +
        (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
         pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2)) + 
        pr1 c0)
       (pr1 aa + pr1 xa2 +
        (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
         pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1)) + 
        pr1 c0))

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L
  (a + x1 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2)) + 
   pr1 c0)
  (a + pr1 xa2 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1)) + 
   pr1 c0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L
  (a + x1 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2)) + 
   pr1 c0)
  (a + pr1 xa2 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1)) + 
   pr1 c0)

l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L
  (a + x1 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +

   pr1 c0)
  (a + x2 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1)) + 
   pr1 c0)

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))

c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X

a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L
  (a + x1 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2)) + 
   pr1 c0a)
  (a + x2 +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa' +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1)) + 
   pr1 c0a)


  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (a + x1 + (a' + a2) + c0) (a + x2 + (a' + a1) + c0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (a + a' + (x1 + a2) + c0) (a + x2 + (a' + a1) + c0)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')

rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

a1:= pr12 xa1: X

L (a + a' + (x1 + a2) + c0) (a + a' + (x2 + a1) + c0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (a + a' + (x1 + a2 + c0)) (a + a' + (x2 + a1) + c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (a + a' + (x1 + a2 + c0)) (a + a' + (x2 + a1 + c0))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : setquot (eqrelabmonoidfrac X A),
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z)
       (prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa' + z'))
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c0) (x2 + a1 + c0)
 apply l.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
z, z': abmonoidfrac X A
l: abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
abmonoidfracrel X A is
  (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
  (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
z, z': abmonoidfrac X A
l: abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
abmonoidfracrel X A is
  (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
  (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
→ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
    (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X : isassoc op: isassoc op
∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
→ abmonoidfracrel X A is
    (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
    (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X

aa, aa': A

  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
z, z': abmonoidfrac X A
abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
→ isofhlevel 1
    (abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x

isaprop

   → abmonoidfracrel X A is

∏ x x' : abmonoiddirprod X A,
make_hProp
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x')
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x +
        prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x' +
        prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
  (int (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabmonoidfrac X A) x'))

X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ∃ c0 : A,
  L
    (pr1 (xa1 + (pr1 aa,, aa')) +
     pr12 (xa2 + (pr1 aa,, aa')) + 
     pr1 c0)
    (pr1 (xa2 + (pr1 aa,, aa')) +
     pr12 (xa1 + (pr1 aa,, aa')) + 
     pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L
       (pr1 xa1 + pr1 aa +
        (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2) +
         pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa') + 
        pr1 c0)
       (pr1 xa2 + pr1 aa +
        (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1) +
         pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa') + 
        pr1 c0))

L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L
  (x1 + a +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa') + 
   pr1 c0)
  (x2 + a +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa') + 
   pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L
  (x1 + a +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa2) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa') + 
   pr1 c0a)
  (x2 + a +
   (pr1carrier (pr1 A) (pr2 xa1) +
    pr1carrier (pr1 A) aa') + 
   pr1 c0a)

 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')

rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c0 + (a + a'))
  (x2 + a1 + (c0 + (a + a')))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c0 + (a + a')) (x2 + a1 + c0 + (a + a'))

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
aa, aa': A
assoc:= assocax X: ∏ x x' x'' : X, x + x' + x'' = x + (x' + x'')
comm:= commax X: ∏ x x' : X, x + x' = x' + x
rer:= abmonoidrer X: ∏ a b c d : X, a + b + (c + d) = a + c + (b + d)
int: ∏ z z' : abmonoidfrac X A,
isaprop
  (abmonoidfracrel X A is z z'
   → abmonoidfracrel X A is
       (z + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa')
       (z' + prabmonoidfrac X A (pr1 aa) aa'))
xa1, xa2: abmonoiddirprod X A
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
a:= pr1 aa: X
a':= pr1 aa': X
c0a:= pr1 t2l: pr1 A
l:= pr2 t2l: (λ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)) 
  (pr1 t2l)
c0:= pr1 c0a: pr1 X
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
L (x1 + a2 + c0) (x2 + a1 + c0)

  apply l.
Qed.


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
abmonoidfracrel X A is' x x'


X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
abmonoidfracrel X A is' x x'

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
→ abmonoidfracrel X A is' x x'
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
∏ x x' : setwithbinopdirprod X A,
abmonoidfracrelint X A L x x'
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L' x x'
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
abmonoidfracrelint X A L x0 x0'
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L' x0 x0'

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ∃ c0 : A,
  L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
    (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∑ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
  L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
    (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
ql: abmonoidfracrel X A is x x'
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr11 t2)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr11 t2)
 apply (impl _ _ (pr2 t2)).
Qed.

is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ∃ c0 : A,
  L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
    (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
     L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
       (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∑ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
  L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
    (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr11 t2)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr11 t2)
 apply (pr1 (lg _ _) (pr2 t2)).
  
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
abmonoidfracrelint X A L' x0 x0'
→ abmonoidfracrelint X A L x0 x0'

(∃ c0 : A,
 L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ∃ c0 : A,

    (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)

A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X

x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : pr1 A,

       (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
(∑ c0 : pr1 A,
 L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0))
→ ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
  L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
    (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L, L': hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
is': ispartbinophrel A L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': abmonoidfrac X A
x0, x0': setwithbinopdirprod X A
t2: ∑ c0 : pr1 A,
L' (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr1 c0)
L (pr1 x0 + pr12 x0' + pr11 t2)
  (pr1 x0' + pr12 x0 + pr11 t2)
 apply (pr2 (lg _ _) (pr2 t2)).
Qed.


X: abmonoid

L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
isdecrel (abmonoidfracrelint X A L)

a1:= pr12 xa1: X

int: L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1) ⨿ ¬ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)

⨿ ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2

l: L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
∃ c0 : A,
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)

x1:= pr1 xa1: X

  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
l: L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 0)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
l: L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2) (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 0)

A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
l: L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2) (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1)

    apply l.

a1:= pr12 xa1: X

nl: ¬ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
nl: ¬ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
¬ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
→ ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
¬ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
→ ¬ abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
abmonoidfracrelint X A L xa1 xa2
→ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
(∃ c0 : A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A,
   L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
     (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
(∑ c0 : pr1 A,
 L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0)
   (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0))
→ make_hProp (pr1 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)))
    (pr2 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
t2l: ∑ c0 : pr1 A, L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0) (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0)
make_hProp (pr1 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)))
  (pr2 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)))
 
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
c0a: pr1 A
l: L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0a)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0a)
make_hProp (pr1 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)))
  (pr2 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1)))

    
X: abmonoid
A: subabmonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
xa1, xa2: setwithbinopdirprod X A
x1:= pr1 xa1: X
a1:= pr12 xa1: X
x2:= pr1 xa2: X
a2:= pr12 xa2: X
c0a: pr1 A
l: L (pr1 xa1 + pr12 xa2 + pr1 c0a)
  (pr1 xa2 + pr12 xa1 + pr1 c0a)
pr1 (L (x1 + a2) (x2 + a1))

    apply ((pr2 is) _ _ _ (pr2 c0a) l).
Defined.

A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isi: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
isdecrel (abmonoidfracrel X A is)

isi: ispartinvbinophrel A L

ispartinvbinophrel A L

is: ispartbinophrel A L

isl: isdecrel L

L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isi: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
ispartinvbinophrel A L
 apply isi.
  
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
isi: ispartinvbinophrel A L
isl: isdecrel L
isdecrel L
 apply isl.
Defined.


(** * 9. Relations and canonical homomorphism to [abmonoidfrac] *)


X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
iscomprelrelfun L (abmonoidfracrel X A is)
  (toabmonoidfrac X A)


X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
iscomprelrelfun L (abmonoidfracrel X A is)
  (toabmonoidfrac X A)

  
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
∏ x x' : X,
L x x'
→ abmonoidfracrel X A is (toabmonoidfrac X A x)
    (toabmonoidfrac X A x')
 
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
abmonoidfracrel X A is (toabmonoidfrac X A x)
  (toabmonoidfrac X A x')

  
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
abmonoidfracrelint X A L (x,, 0) (x',, 0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : pr1 A, L (x + 0 + pr1 c0) (x' + 0 + pr1 c0))
 
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
∑ c0 : pr1 A, L (x + 0 + pr1 c0) (x' + 0 + pr1 c0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
L (x + 0 + pr1 0) (x' + 0 + pr1 0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
A 0
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
L (x + 0) (x' + 0)

  
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
L (x + 0) (x' + 0)
 
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
A 0
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
L x x'
 
X: abmonoid
A: submonoid X
L: hrel X
is: ispartbinophrel A L
x, x': X
l: L x x'
L x x'

  apply l.
Qed.
